facebook.caption:
POV: you pull up to Regent Phu Quoc and suddenly every other hotel feels like a bad decision.

4.9 stars across 1,419 reviews. That number doesn't lie.

Sit inside the Marina Integrated Resort Complex on đường Bào Dương Tơ and you're in a different world from the busy tourist strips. The kind of place you book once and spend the next trip trying to justify booking again.

Save this for your Phu Quoc trip.
facebook.video_caption: Walking into Regent Phu Quoc for the first time. 4.9 stars. 1,419 people already knew. You're just finding out now. đường Bào Dương Tơ, Phú Quốc. Add it to the list.
